ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the customer */,
  "discountApplied" INTEGER /* Whether a discount was applied to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the store */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "transaction_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "item_amount" REAL /* Amount for the product in the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association rule */,
  "antecedents" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of antecedent products */,
  "consequents" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of consequent products */,
  "antecedent_support" REAL /* Support of the antecedent products */,
  "consequent_support" REAL /* Support of the consequent products */,
  "support" REAL /* Support of the rule */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the rule */,
  "lift" REAL /* Lift of the rule */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage of the rule */,
  "conviction" REAL /* Conviction of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, store manager, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., marketing, operations) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the association rule being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the rule */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES association_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segmentation" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "segment_rules" TEXT /* Rules defining the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segmentation_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-segment mapping */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer was assigned to the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segmentation_mapping_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segmentation ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "recommended_on" TEXT /* Date when the product was recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
